title: DIA
subtitle: Verifiable reference prices for valuation, settlement and risk.
description:
## What it does

DIA oracle price feeds over x402: transparent, multi-source aggregated token quotations across 80+ CEX/DEX markets for 3,000+ assets, through one provider with TRON and BSC payment routes.


## Best for

- Agents needing verifiable reference prices for valuation or settlement.
- Manipulation-resistant pricing as a risk or compliance check.
- Cross-checking a venue spot price against an independent oracle.

## Endpoints

- `GET /v1/quotation/{symbol}` — Aggregated price quotation by asset symbol
- `GET /v1/assetQuotation/{blockchain}/{address}` — Aggregated price quotation by blockchain + contract address

## Code usage

These routes are x402-paid passthroughs. Use x402 payment for gateway access. TRON Mainnet (`exact_permit`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-tron/v1/quotation/{symbol}'
```

Pay on TRON Mainnet with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-tron/v1/quotation/{symbol}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001
```

BSC Mainnet (`eip155:56`, `exact_permit`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-bsc/v1/quotation/{symbol}'
```

Pay on BSC Mainnet with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-bsc/v1/quotation/{symbol}' \
  --method GET \
  --network eip155:56 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001
```
useCase: Use to get a real-time, multi-market aggregated USD price for a token by symbol or by blockchain+contract address.

zh-CN.title: DIA
zh-CN.subtitle: 可验证的参考价,用于估值、结算与风控。
zh-CN.description:
## 能做什么

DIA 预言机价格的 x402 网关:跨 80+ CEX/DEX 市场、覆盖 3000+ 资产的透明多源聚合报价,一个 provider 覆盖 TRON 与 BSC。

## 适合场景

- 需要可验证参考价做估值或结算的 Agent。
- 用抗操纵价格做风控/合规校验。
- 与盘口现价交叉验证。

## 接口

- `GET /v1/quotation/{symbol}` — 按资产符号聚合的价格报价
- `GET /v1/assetQuotation/{blockchain}/{address}` — 按链 + 合约地址聚合的价格报价

## 调用示例

这些是 x402 付费直通路由,通过 x402 支付后访问网关。TRON 主网(`exact_permit`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-tron/v1/quotation/{symbol}'
```

使用 x402 CLI 在 TRON 主网付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-tron/v1/quotation/{symbol}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001
```

BSC 主网(`eip155:56`,`exact_permit`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-bsc/v1/quotation/{symbol}'
```

使用 x402 CLI 在 BSC 主网付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-bsc/v1/quotation/{symbol}' \
  --method GET \
  --network eip155:56 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001
```
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。
zh-CN.mainTitle: 去中心化多源预言机价格
